semantics.label: Task description
semantics.description: Prompt shown above the drawing canvas. May contain HTML.

fields.label: Reference / solution image
fields.description: Optional image revealed when the learner clicks 'Show solution'. Use this to show the expected drawing.

fields.label: Drawing alternative text
fields.description: Describes the canvas for screen reader users. Empty falls back to the task description.

fields.label: Canvas base width (px)
fields.description: The canvas scales responsively but uses this value to set its internal aspect. Very large values produce bigger PNG exports and xAPI attachments.

fields.label: Background color
fields.description: Used when background type is Solid color.

fields.label: Background image
fields.description: Used when background type is Image (e.g. graph paper, photo to annotate).

fields.label: Enable 'Show solution' button
fields.description: Only effective if a reference image is configured.

fields.label: Lock canvas after submit
fields.description: Prevents further editing once the drawing has been submitted (until retry).

options.label: Completion (full score when submitted with a drawing)

fields.label: Grading endpoint URL
fields.description: POST endpoint that accepts the learner drawing and returns a JSON score. Ignored when the host provides H5PIntegration.paintAiGrader. Learner drawings and task metadata may be transmitted to this URL; ensure you have a legal basis and privacy notice before using an external service. See docs/PRIVACY.md.

fields.label: Grading rubric
fields.description: Optional criteria sent to the grading service (plain text or HTML).

fields.label: Include reference image URL in grading request
Max PNG width sent to grader (px)
Maximum score
fields.description: Maximum points for this question. Manual: learner score stays 0 until evaluated. Completion: full score after submit. AI: score returned by the grading service.
